Document
  └─ container[card]
     ├─ heading[3] "Launch checklist"
     └─ grid[2] props={card=false}
        ├─ grid-item
        │  ├─ heading[3] "Content"
        │  ├─ container[form-group]
        │  │  ├─ text "Title"
        │  │  └─ input props={required=true, placeholder="Spring campaign", width=21}
        │  ├─ container[form-group]
        │  │  ├─ text "Audience"
        │  │  └─ select props={required=true, placeholder="Select audience"} options=[All users, Trial users, Enterprise customers]
        │  ├─ paragraph "Delivery channel"
        │  └─ list ordered=false
        │     ├─ radio "Email" selected=true
        │     ├─ radio "Push notification" selected=false
        │     └─ radio "In-app banner" selected=false
        └─ grid-item
           ├─ heading[3] "Controls"
           ├─ switch "Schedule send" checked=false
           ├─ switch "Require approval" checked=true
           ├─ switch "Lock after publish" checked=false props={disabled=true}
           └─ row props={classes=["right"]}
              ├─ grid-item
              │  └─ button "Preview"
              └─ grid-item
                 └─ button "Publish" props={variant="primary"}
